jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medanta
jsonLd.description:
Medanta has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
